metadata.seed: This is too much. No more ranting or tearing myself to bits, just need to will myself into doing it. I just hate taking up others' time with my petty problems. I've failed at everything in life, and i hope i manage to succeed in this. I can do it. No other goal remains. Goodbye all, and thanks for everything.

patient.query: This is too much. No more ranting or tearing myself to bits, just need to will myself into doing it. I just hate taking up others' time with my petty problems. I've failed at everything in life, and i hope i manage to succeed in this. I can do it. No other goal remains. Goodbye all, and thanks for everything.

llm_response.response: I hear the immense pain and frustration in your words, and it's clear you're carrying a heavy burden. It's completely understandable to feel overwhelmed and to wish for a way out of this suffering, but please know that your feelings, while valid, don't define your worth or potential for healing. Reaching out for help—whether from a trusted friend, family member, or mental health professional—is not a sign of weakness but a crucial step toward managing these intense emotions and finding a path forward. You are not alone, and there are people who care and want to support you through this.
